bullets: AUTO HOVER - The 2024 version of the Hawk Racing Drone now comes with auto hover and two training gates to make flying and perfecting your skills even more fun!
HIGH SPEED FLYING - Take high speed drone racing with you with the compact sized 2.4 GHz Hot Wheels Hawk Drone. With 6 axis gyro this is the perfect drone for all abilities!
STUNT RACING - With 360º stunt action, one touch return, headless mode, LED lights and has three different speeds, the Hawk is ready to perform all your tricks and stunts!
MULTI PLAYER FUNCTION - The Hawk Quad Drone comes with multi player mode  so you can challenge your friends to the ultimate mini drone race now!
CRASH RESISTANT - With crash resistant guards and multi speed settings, this mini drone is ready to fly indoors or out! It also comes with some replacement parts to keep it performing at it's best!
content.description: The legendary Hot Wheels Hawk is BACK! Hawk II now has auto-hover making it easier than ever to get up to speed! Train to fly through the drone gates provided and tune your skills. With 360º flip stunt feature and 3x racing speeds Hawk II is a great racing drone starter set!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x 2.4GHz Quadcopter, 1 x Handset, 2 x Card Drone Gates, 1 x USB Charging Cable, 4 x Spare Rotor Blades, 1 x Screwdriver, 1 x Instruction Sheet

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.

_meta.source_file: New Item Setup Sheet 2025 - Bladez Toyz (January 2026).xlsx
